title: Sort a list
description: Implement a function that sorts a list of integers ascending.

title: Reverse a string
description: Return the reverse of the input string.

title: Palindrome check
description: Return True if the string reads the same forwards and backwards (ignore case and non-alphanumeric).

title: Currency formatter
description: Format amount as USD string with two decimals, e.g. 12.5 -> '$12.50'.

title: Email simple check
description: Return True if s contains exactly one '@' and a '.' after '@'.

title: Parse CSV line
description: Given a comma-separated line, return list of stripped fields.

title: Merge sorted lists
description: Merge two sorted lists of ints into one sorted list (allow duplicates).
function_signature: def merge_sorted(a: list, b: list) -> list:

title: Meeting conflict
description: Given list of (start,end) int tuples, return True if any pair overlaps (touching at endpoint is not overlap).
